js.home: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v); if(!v) return ''; if(v.startsWith('//')) return 'https:'+v; if(v.startsWith('/')) return env.baseUrl+v; return v;}; const c=String(env.get('category','1')||'1'); const body=await req(env.baseUrl + '/api/categories/' + c + '/videos'); const json=JSON.parse(body); const list=(json.data&&json.data.videos)||[]; return list.map(i=>({id:txt(i.vod_id),title:txt(i.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(i.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(i.vod_pic),remark:txt(i.vod_remarks)||txt(i.type_name),desc:txt(i.vod_content)}));
js.detail: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const split=v=>txt(v).split(/[,，、;|/]+/).map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean); const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v); if(!v) return ''; if(v.startsWith('//')) return 'https:'+v; if(v.startsWith('/')) return env.baseUrl+v; return v;}; const id=String(env.get('movieId','')||''); const body=await req(env.baseUrl + '/api/videos/' + id); const json=JSON.parse(body); const d=json.data||{}; const routes=Array.isArray(d.available_routes)?d.available_routes:[]; const eps=Array.isArray(d.episodes)?d.episodes:[]; let playlist=routes.map(r=>({title:txt(r)||'default',videos:eps.filter(e=>txt(e.route)===txt(r)).map(e=>({text:txt(e.name)||('EP'+txt(e.episode)),url:toUrl(e.url)})).filter(v=>v.url)})).filter(g=>g.videos.length>0); if(!playlist.length&&toUrl(d.vod_play_url)){playlist=[{title:'default',videos:[{text:'play',url:toUrl(d.vod_play_url)}]}];} return {id:txt(d.vod_id)||id,title:txt(d.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(d.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(d.vod_pic),remark:txt(d.vod_remarks),desc:[txt(d.type_name),txt(d.vod_year),txt(d.vod_area),txt(d.vod_lang),split(d.vod_class).join(' / '),txt(d.vod_content)||txt(d.vod_blurb)].filter(Boolean).join('\n'),playlist:playlist};
js.search: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v); if(!v) return ''; if(v.startsWith('//')) return 'https:'+v; if(v.startsWith('/')) return env.baseUrl+v; return v;}; const kw=txt(env.get('keyword','')); if(!kw) return []; const body=await req({url:'https://meilisearch.247kan.com/indexes/videos/search',method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer Ub-lWdJKpjLqIHIayy8b0m1Nc49HMqOZr0U5jt7UPZM','X-Meili-API-Key':'Ub-lWdJKpjLqIHIayy8b0m1Nc49HMqOZr0U5jt7UPZM','Accept':'application/json','Content-Type':'application/json','User-Agent':'247kan-web-client'},bodyType:'json',data:{q:kw,limit:20,offset:0,attributesToRetrieve:['vod_id','vod_name','vod_pic','vod_tmdb_poster','vod_remarks','type_name','vod_content']},noCache:true}); const json=JSON.parse(body); return (json.hits||[]).map(i=>({id:txt(i.vod_id),title:txt(i.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(i.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(i.vod_pic),remark:txt(i.vod_remarks)||txt(i.type_name),desc:txt(i.vod_content)}));
